banner.slide3Desc: Stock up on your favourites and enjoy complimentary shipping. No code needed -- it's on us.

about.heroDesc: Discover the passion and craftsmanship behind every bottle.
about.passionP1: Scentique was born from a deep appreciation for the art of perfumery. Founded in 2018, we set out to create a sanctuary for fragrance enthusiasts — a place where the world's most exquisite scents are celebrated and accessible. Our journey began with a simple belief: that a signature scent is more than just a fragrance; it's an extension of identity, a memory in a bottle, and a silent statement of elegance.
about.passionP2: We travel the globe to source the finest raw materials — from the jasmine fields of Grasse to the sandalwood forests of Mysore. Each fragrance in our collection is meticulously crafted in collaboration with master perfumers, ensuring every bottle contains a work of art. Every ingredient is thoughtfully selected to create harmonious compositions that evolve beautifully on the skin over time.
about.passionP3: At Scentique, we believe that luxury should be an experience, not just a purchase. From the moment you browse our collection to the unboxing of your order, every touchpoint reflects our commitment to excellence. Whether you're a seasoned collector or exploring fragrances for the first time, we're here to guide you on your personal olfactory journey.
about.craftsmanshipDesc: Every fragrance we offer is a masterpiece of olfactory artistry. We collaborate with world-renowned perfumers to create scents that are timeless, sophisticated, and beautifully balanced.
about.sustainabilityDesc: We are committed to responsible luxury. From eco-friendly packaging to ethical ingredient sourcing, we strive to minimize our environmental footprint while maximising quality.
about.authenticityDesc: We guarantee 100% authentic products sourced directly from official distributors and prestigious fragrance houses. Every bottle comes with a certificate of authenticity.

contact.heroDesc: We'd love to hear from you. Reach out with any questions or inquiries.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.successMessage: Thank you for reaching out! Your message has been received, and our team will be in touch soon.

brands.heroDesc: Explore the world's most prestigious fragrance houses, all in one place.

collections.heroDesc: Discover our thoughtfully curated fragrance collections, each telling its own unique story.
collections.bloomDesc: A celebration of femininity and grace. This collection brings together the most exquisite floral compositions, from the romantic allure of rose to the intoxicating charm of jasmine. Each fragrance captures the essence of a blooming garden at dawn.
collections.noirDesc: For those drawn to depth and mystery. The Noir Collection features rich, woody fragrances with notes of oud, sandalwood, and amber. These are scents that linger — bold, sophisticated, and unforgettable.
collections.aquaDesc: Light, refreshing, and invigorating. The Aqua Collection is perfect for everyday elegance, featuring bright citrus notes blended with aquatic accords and green undertones. Energise your senses with every spritz.
collections.reserveDesc: Our most exclusive creations, crafted in limited quantities. The Reserve Collection showcases experimental blends and rare ingredients for the true connoisseur seeking something truly unique.

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.title: What Our Customers Say
testimonials.quote1: Absolutely stunning fragrances! I've never received so many compliments. The quality is exceptional and the longevity is incredible. My new go-to for luxury scents.
testimonials.quote2: The packaging alone is a work of art. Fast shipping and the scent was exactly what I hoped for. Will definitely be ordering again.
testimonials.quote3: I was blown away by the selection and the customer service. The team helped me find my perfect signature scent. Highly recommend!

blog.blog1Excerpt: From bold woody compositions to reinvented florals, 2025 is shaping up to be a transformative year for perfumery. We've rounded up the scents defining the season.
blog.blog2Title: How to Choose the Perfect Perfume for Any Occasion
blog.blog2Excerpt: Whether you're heading to a formal gala or a casual brunch, the right scent sets the tone. Discover how to match fragrances to every moment.
blog.blog3Title: The Art of Fragrance Layering: Make Your Scent Last Longer
blog.blog3Excerpt: Unlock the secrets of professional fragrance layering. Learn how to combine scents to create a unique, long-lasting signature that stays with you all day.
